description: Aggregates individual AmpliconSuite runs. Takes in zip files (or .tar.gz) and aggregates the results. Results can directly be used to load onto AmpliconRepository.
author: Edwin Huang;Mesirov Lab
plan:
## AmpliconSuiteAggregator GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
AmpliconSuiteAggregator is a GenePattern module that Aggregates individual AmpliconSuite runs. Takes in zip files (or .tar.gz) and aggregates the results. Results can directly be used to load onto AmpliconRepository.

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 8 parameters:
- Required: Amplicon.Architect.Results, project_name, accept.license
- Optional: Amplicon.Repository.Email, run.amplicon.classifier, reference.genome, upload.only, name.map

### 3. Command Line
```
python3 /opt/genepatt/AmpliconSuiteAggregator.py -s prod --filelist <Amplicon.Architect.Results> --output_name <project_name> <Amplicon.Repository.Email> --upload_only <upload.only>  <run.amplicon.classifier> --accept_license <accept.license>  <reference.genome> <name.map>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: genepattern/amplicon-suite-aggregator\:v2.8

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: Amplicon.Architect.Results
parameters.description: Compressed (.tar.gz, .zip) files of the results from individual or grouped Amplicon Architect runs.

parameters.name: project_name
parameters.description: Prefix for output name for resulting '.tar.gz'. Result will be named\: *output_prefix*.tar.gz.

parameters.name: Amplicon.Repository.Email
parameters.description: If wanting to directly transfer results to AmpliconRepository.org, please enter your email.

parameters.name: accept.license
parameters.description: If uploading to Amplicon Repository, you must agree to our Creative Commons v4 license

parameters.name: run.amplicon.classifier
parameters.description: Whether or not to re-run Amplicon Classifier

parameters.name: reference.genome
parameters.description: Reference genome used for Amplicon Architect results in the input.

parameters.name: upload.only
parameters.description: Upload only mode. Will skip aggregator and upload to server as is.

parameters.name: name.map
parameters.description: A two column file providing current identifier for each sample (col 1), and a replacement name (col 2).
